title: February 15
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|February|hide30=yes|hide31=yes}}

'''February 15''' is the 46th day of the year. There are 319 days remaining, 320 in leap years.</noinclude>
*[[1920s#1923|1923]] – [[Keene Curtis]] is born.
*[[1920s#1927|1927]] – [[Harvey Korman]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Jamison Jones]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 2|''Star Wars Weekly'' 2]] published.
*[[1983]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 71|''Star Wars'' (1977) 71]] published.
*[[1984]] – [[Erin Rose Wage]] is born.
*1984 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 35|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 35]] published.
*[[1986]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 139|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 139]] published.
*[[1993]] – [[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']] published.
*[[1995]] – ''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]'' released on the [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]] platform.
*[[1998]] – [[Zachary Gordon]] is born.
*[[1999]] – ''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Vader's Fortress]]'' re-released.
*[[2001]] – ''[[Darth Maul: Saboteur]]'' released in [[eBook]] format.
*[[2006]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]'' published.
*2006 – "[[The Story of General Grievous: Lord of War]]" published.
*[[2012]] – [[Dawn of the Jedi: Force Storm 1|''Dawn of the Jedi: Force Storm'' 1]] published.
*[[2013]] – "[[The Jedi Who Knew Too Much]]" airs in Canada.
*[[2014]] – [[Christopher Malcolm]] dies.
*[[2016]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Resistance Rises]]'' premieres on [[Disney XD]] with "[[Poe to the Rescue]]."
*[[2017]] – [[Poe Dameron 11|''Poe Dameron'' 11]] published.
*2017 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 28|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 28]] published.
*[[2019]] – [[Star Wars: Episode IX The Rise of Skywalker|''Star Wars'': Episode IX ''Rise of the Skywalker'']] concludes filming.
*2019 – "[[Stormtroopers vs. Rebels – Soldiers of the Galactic Empire]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2022]] – [[The Art of Star Wars: The Mandalorian (Season Two)|''The Art of Star Wars: The Mandalorian'' (Season Two)]] published.
*2022 – ''[[Disorder]]'' released.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Legacy of the Sith]]'' released.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars Insider: The Galaxy's Greatest Heroes]]'' published.
*[[2023]] – "[[The Crossing]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*2023 – [[Bounty Hunters 31|''Bounty Hunters'' 31]] published.
*2023 – [[Star Wars (2020) 31|''Star Wars'' (2020) 31]] published.
*[[2025]] – "[[Nubs Learns To Paint]]" released on [[StarWarsKids.com]].
<noinclude>
